scripts.dev:web: panda --watch & PANDA_PID=$!; trap 'kill $PANDA_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM; vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 1420
scripts.dev:terminal-bridge: npm run stage:bridge -- --profile debug || exit 1; node scripts/run-with-zig.mjs cargo run --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml --bin terminal-debug-bridge & BRIDGE_PID=$!; panda --watch & PANDA_PID=$!; trap 'kill $BRIDGE_PID $PANDA_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM; VITE_REVERIE_TERMINAL_BRIDGE=1 vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 1421
scripts.test:web:harness: npm run build:web && npm run test:web:harness:smoke
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run stage:bridge -- --profile debug || exit 1; panda --watch & PANDA_PID=$!; vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 1420 & VITE_PID=$!; trap 'kill $PANDA_PID $VITE_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT INT TERM; until curl -sf http://127.0.0.1:1420 >/dev/null; do kill -0 $VITE_PID 2>/dev/null || exit 1; sleep 0.2; done; node scripts/tauri-channel.mjs dev node scripts/run-with-zig.mjs cargo run --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.dev:tauri: npm run stage:bridge -- --profile debug || exit 1; node scripts/tauri-channel.mjs dev node scripts/run-with-zig.mjs cargo run --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.build:web: npm run panda && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build:web && npm run stage:bridge -- --profile release && node scripts/run-with-zig.mjs cargo build --release --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.bundle: cd apps/desktop/src-tauri && node ../../../scripts/run-with-zig.mjs npx tauri build
scripts.run:release: npm run stage:bridge -- --profile release || exit 1; node scripts/run-with-zig.mjs cargo run --release --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check:frontend: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build:web
scripts.check:rust: cargo test && node scripts/run-with-zig.mjs cargo test --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml && node scripts/run-with-zig.mjs cargo check --manifest-path apps/desktop/src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.check: npm run check:frontend && npm run check:rust
